description_long: This is a detailed model of a bald eagle in mid-flight, with its wings fully extended and slightly arched downward. The bird features a striking white head and tail, contrasting with its dark brown body and wings, which are textured to show individual feather details. The beak is yellow and hooked, typical of raptors, and the talons are also yellow, gripping an unseen object or surface. The wings display a mottled pattern with lighter and darker brown shades, and the tail feathers are fanned out, showing a rounded shape. The eyes are sharp and forward-facing, giving the bird a focused, predatory expression. The overall posture and anatomical features are realistic, capturing the dynamic motion of a soaring eagle.
description: A realistic bald eagle with a white head and tail, dark brown wings, and yellow beak and talons, depicted in a dynamic flying pose. The wings are outstretched and the feather details are finely textured.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the fanned white tail and the full span of the dark brown wings.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the white head, yellow beak, and the layered feathers of the left wing.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the eagle's intense gaze, hooked beak, and outstretched wings with visible feather patterning.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite side, emphasizing the right wing and the white tail feathers.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid white head and tail, mottled brown wings and body with subtle feather barring
